raw_consumer_statement:
I opened a new account XXXX and purchased about $ XXXX {$400.00} of clothing. I have received some items in the mail with no invoice attached. I'm not sure if I have received all that I ordered. I was supposed to be given a 25 % discount on my first order. 
I can not access my account online. I have received nothing confirming my order. 
I have tried dozens of times resetting the password for access, using different computers. Still no access. I have spent hours on the phone with customer service that has offered no help. I don't have any way to see a receipt, pay my bill or verify what I have purchased and there seems to be no where to go in this company for help. 
I am receiving Macy 's advertising emails after i signed up for my account
